title: PMP-1 Part A: flesh out exercise catalog seed to ~150 movements
description: Expand migration/catalog-seed.json from 34 to a comprehensive set of common gym/machine/calisthenics/cardio movements with variations (esp. cable). Keep existing schema v2 + trackingModes convention (reps_weight/reps_bodyweight/duration). Drop test-exercise fixture. Seed to Firestore is a user-gated step (needs write creds).
notes: Seed JSON complete + validated. migration/catalog-seed.json: 74 exercises, 203 variations, 277 selectable options. All 33 prior ids kept, test-exercise dropped, schema v2 + trackingModes convention preserved, new muscle 'traps' added. Dry-run passes (74+1 docs). REMAINING (user-gated): place pumppal-write-perms.json and run seed with --apply --catalog-version <bumped> to push to Firestore.
close_reason: Seeded 74 exercises / 203 variations to Firestore (pumppal-c9199), meta version 2. Orphaned test-exercise doc deleted. Collection verified at 74 docs.
